channel.title: Search - Tag - Jerry Liu CN's Blog
channel.description: Search - Tag - Jerry Liu CN's Blog

item.title: Build a Personal GitHub Blog with Hugo and LoveIt Theme
item.author: Jerry Liu CN
item.description: Introduction This tutorial will guide you step by step to build an efficient and modern personal blog on GitHub, covering: Blog framework selection: Based on the Hugo static site generator, combined with the beautiful and powerful LoveIt theme. Automated deployment: Use GitHub Actions to achieve continuous integration and automatic publishing in a dual-repo mode. No manual operation is required—just push your code to go live automatically. Search integration: Integrate Algolia for full-site content search, and use automated scripts/processes to keep the index in sync in real time, improving content retrieval experience.
